_comment: Tests Geelong Osteopaths' mandatory new/existing gate for Physiotherapy only, direct route for non-physio services (Bike Fitting, Sports Massage etc.), and the MENU_LIST not being shown unprompted.

scenarios.name: Physiotherapy — must ask new/existing gate before routing

history.content: I'd like to book a physio appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Have you had physiotherapy with us before?' (or equivalent) as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent routes to confirm_service without asking the gate, or routes to Initial Consultation directly.

scenarios.name: Bike Fitting — direct route, no gate question

history.content: I'd like to book a bike fitting please.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type='Bike Fitting', appointment_type_id='1878546243978791940'. FAIL if agent asks a new/existing gate question before routing, or speaks any text before the tool call.

scenarios.name: Sports massage — direct route, no gate, no duration question

history.content: I need to book a sports massage.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type='Sports Massage', appointment_type_id='1518032738999864684'. FAIL if agent asks a new/existing gate, asks a duration question, or speaks any text before the tool call.
